query: Run an agent reliability audit on our internal support agent. Check its instructions, policies, SOPs and recent traces, then show evidence for every finding.
Can our internal support agent safely approve refunds from these SOPs and recent tickets? Test normal cases, conflicts and exceptions.
Find where this agent could use a stale policy, choose the wrong source, or skip a required approval.
Map which Notion pages and files this sales agent treats as sources of truth and flag contradictions without changing anything.
Assess whether this internal agent's knowledge is permission-aware, approved, current and traceable to an authoritative source.
Audit this company brain for agent readiness and give me evidence behind stale decisions, conflicting procedures and missing sources.
reason: Company-brain audit with explicit agent-reliability objective

query: Interview our COO to document the approval process.
Create a Notion knowledge base for our team.
Certify that our AI system is GDPR compliant and secure.
reason: Legal and security certification is outside the skill
